name: Proline Adult Cat Food Canned - Liver Chunks inGravy 415g- Pack of 20
description: Proline Adult Cat Food Canned - Fish Chunks in Jelly , fully balanced all-natural cat food with fish protein. Carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult cats. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein ................. 7.5% Fat ......................... 3.5% Crude Ash.......................... 2% Crude Cellulose (Fiber) .........0.3% Moisture .......................... 82% INGREDIENTS: Meat and animal derivatives (4% liver), cereals, minerals, vegetable by-products, sugar. MINERALS: Biotin, Taurine, Zinc, Manganese, Copper. VITAMINS: Vit. D3, Vit. E.
